zh.Sock Dennis, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特索可 丹尼斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Bonville於1293年出生在英國戴文書特時，他的父親Nicholas Bonville33歲，母親Hawise Payne or avis23歲。他於1329年與Joan Champernon在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1354年在英國薩默塞特索可 丹尼斯享年61歲，埋葬在英國戴文阿可明斯特。

zh-hans.Sock Dennis, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特索可 丹尼斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Bonville于1293年出生在英国戴文書特时，他的父亲Nicholas Bonville33岁，母亲Hawise Payne or avis23岁。他于1329年与Joan Champernon在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1354年在英国薩默塞特索可 丹尼斯享年61岁，埋葬在英国戴文阿可明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Bonville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of   Bonneville   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Bonneville
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francois, Liette, Normand, Pierre.
French: habitational name from any of numerous places called Bonneville, from Old French bonne ‘good’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Bonville .
Altered form of French Bonnevialle: habitational name from Bonnevialle in the central part of France.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Bonville was born in 1293, in Shute, Devon, England, his father, Nicholas Bonville, was 33 and his mother, Hawise Payne or avis, was 23. He married Joan Champernon in 1329, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1354, in Sock Dennis, Somerset, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Axminster, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Bonville est né en 1293, à Shute, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Bonville, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Hawise Payne or avis, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Joan Champernon en 1329, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1354, à Sock Dennis, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Axminster, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Bonville 1293 in Shute, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Bonville 33 und seine Mutter Hawise Payne or avis 23. Er hat 1329 in Devon, England Joan Champernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1354 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Sock Dennis, Somerset, England und wurde in Axminster, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Bonville è nato il nel 1293 nel Shute, Devon, England, il suo padre, Nicholas Bonville, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Hawise Payne or avis, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Joan Champernon nel 1329, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1354, nel Sock Dennis, Somerset, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Axminster, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Bonvilleが1293年にイギリスデボンシュトで生まれた時，父Nicholas Bonvilleは33歳，母Hawise Payne or avisは23歳であった。1329年にイギリスデボンでJoan Champernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1354年にイギリスソメルセトソック デニスで61歳で死去し，イギリスデボンアクスミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Bonville(이)가 1293년 영국 데폰 슈트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Bonville(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise Payne or avis(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1329년 영국 데폰에서 Joan Champernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1354년 영국 서머세트 속 데니스에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 액민스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Bonville nasceu em 1293, em Shute, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Bonville, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Payne or avis, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Champernon em 1329, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1354, em Sock Dennis, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Axminster, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Bonville родился в 1293 г. в местности шут, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Bonville было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Hawise Payne or avis, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Champernon в 1329 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1354 г. в местности сокк деннис, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности аксминстир, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Bonville nació en 1293, en Shute, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Bonville, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Hawise Payne or avis, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Joan Champernon en 1329, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1354, en Sock Dennis, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Axminster, Devon, Inglaterra.
